finding_results.notes: Rewrote the opening so Aldric's running interface read has a fresh image instead of repeating the prior 'report to an order' formula, and replaced the editorial explanation of Derry's chatter with concrete topics he keeps putting into the air.

Added a consequential aftermath beat after the creek wash-off that shows the unstable three-voice arrangement affecting Maren's movement and Vess's tactical intrusions while Aldric stays silent. Verified chapter length at 5074 words.

summary: Chapter 4 now opens without recycled cross-chapter phrasing, shows Derry's avoidance behavior instead of re-explaining it, and includes an expanded post-hollow aftermath beat that reinforces the unstable unclassified state while bringing the chapter above the 5000-word floor.
